SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.task

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.task
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi.impl.context
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.delegate
Interfaces used to include Java code in a process as the behavior of an activity or as a listener to process events with
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.delegate.JavaDelegate
s.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.form
Classes related to the
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.calendar

org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.rest.sub.task.impl
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.task
Classes related to the
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.test.assertions.bpmn
 
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.task used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
    Class
    Description
    Attachment
    Any type of content that is be associated with a task or with a process instance.
    Comment
    User comments that form discussions around tasks.
    Event
    Deprecated.
    IdentityLink
    An identity link is used to associate a task with a certain identity.
    NativeTaskQuery
    Allows querying of Tasks via native (SQL) queries
    Task
    Represents one task for a human user.
    TaskQuery
    Allows programmatic querying of Tasks;
    TaskReport
     
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.task used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.cdi
    Class
    Description
    Task
    Represents one task for a human user.
